Title: Successful Google Sign-In
Preconditions:
- User has Google account linked to the app.
- Internet connection is active.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app and tap the **Login** button.
2. Select **Google Sign-In** and enter valid credentials.
3. Grant necessary permissions (e.g., profile access).
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to **JoinFamilyActivity** (Page 3).
- No error messages appear.

Title: Failed Google Sign-In (Invalid Credentials)
Preconditions: - User attempts to log in with incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app and tap **Login**.
2. Select **Google Sign-In** and enter invalid credentials.
3. Tap **Sign In**.
Expected Result:
- Error message: *"Invalid email or password"* appears.
- User remains on the **LoginActivity** screen.

Title: Create New Family Successfully
Preconditions:
- User is logged in via **LoginActivity**.
- User navigates to **JoinFamilyActivity**.
Test Data: - Family name: `Martini`, code: `FAM2024`, email: `mom@martini.com`, picture URL: `https://example.com/family.jpg`, child age: `1`, weight: `8`.
Test Steps:
1. In **JoinFamilyActivity**, select **"Create New Family"**.
2. Fill all fields with valid data (above).
3. Tap **Submit**.
Expected Result:
- Family is created; user is redirected to **FamilyActivity**.
- Confirmation toast: *"Family created successfully!"* appears.
- Family code (`FAM2024`) is displayed in **FamilyActivity**.

Title: Create Family with Missing Required Field
Test Steps:
1. Select **"Create New Family"**.
2. Leave **FamilyCode** field empty; fill others.
3. Tap **Submit**.
Expected Result:
- Error message: *"Family code is required"* appears.
- User remains on the **CreateFamilyActivity** screen.

Title: Add Document with Valid Breastfeeding Data
Preconditions:
- User is in **Arriva raccolta** (Page 1) after logging in.
- Family is created (e.g., `FAM2024`).
Test Data: - Email: `mom@martini.com`, FamilyCode: `FAM2024`, Nome: `Luca`, pictureurl: `https://example.com/luca.jpg`, Allattamento: `0001` (valid code).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Arriva raccolta** → **Aggiungi documento**.
2. Fill all fields with valid data (above).
3. Tap **Save**.
Expected Result:
- Document is saved; toast: *"Document added successfully"* appears.
- Data appears in the **Allattamento** (breastfeeding) section.

Title: Add Document with Invalid Family Code
Expected Result:
- Error message: *"Family code not found"* appears.
- Document is **not** saved.

Title: Navigate from Footer Menu to Monitoring Section
Test Steps:
1. Tap the **footer menu** (e.g., bottom bar icon).
2. Select **Monitoring Section** (Decision: **SI**).
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to **MonitorFragment** (Page 3).
- Monitoring graphs (sleep/nutrition/growth) are visible.

Title: Navigate from Monitoring to Notes via Footer Menu
Test Steps:
1. In **Sezione di monitoraggio**, tap the **footer menu**.
2. Select **Notes** (Decision: **NO** → transition to **Note**).
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to **NoteFragment**.
- Empty note list is displayed.

Title: Create and Edit a Note
Test Steps:
1. Tap **+ Add Note**.
2. Enter title: *"Luca’s feeding"*, content: *"6:30 AM, 150ml"*.
3. Tap **Save**.
4. Tap the note to edit; change content to *"6:30 AM, 160ml"*.
5. Tap **Update**.
Expected Result:
- Note is created and displayed in **NoteFragment**.
- Edited content is saved; toast: *"Note updated"* appears.

Title: Return to Home from Notes via Footer Menu
Preconditions: - User is on **NoteFragment** with no active edits.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the **footer menu**.
2. Select **Return to Home** (Decision: **NO** → **Ritorno alla home**).
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to **HomeActivity**.
- **HomeFragment** is displayed.

Title: View Sleep Graph in Profile
Test Steps:
1. Tap **Sleep Graph** tab.
2. Wait for graph to load.
Expected Result:
- **GraphSonnoFragment** displays a sleep duration graph (e.g., bars for hours slept).
- No errors or blank screens.

Title: View Growth Graph with No Data
Preconditions: - User has no growth data entered.
Expected Result:
- Message: *"No growth data available"* appears.
- Graph area is empty or shows a placeholder.

Title: Add Document with Empty Picture URL
Expected Result:
- Document is saved **without** a picture (default icon appears).
- No error for missing URL.

Title: Cyclical Footer Menu Navigation
Test Steps:
1. Access footer menu → **Monitoring** → **Notes** → **Return to Home**.
2. Repeat step 1 **3 times**.
Expected Result:
- User cycles through **Home → Monitoring → Notes → Home** without crashes.
- No infinite loop or performance degradation.

Title: End-to-End Flow: Login → Create Family → Add Document → View Graph
Test Steps:
1. **Login**: Sign in via Google.
2. **Create Family**: Enter `FAM2024`, `Martini`, `mom@martini.com`.
3. **Add Document**: Fill breastfeeding data (email, family code, `0001`).
4. Navigate to **ProfiloActivity** → **Sleep Graph**.
Expected Result:
- All steps complete without errors.
- Document data is reflected in graphs (if linked).
- User ends on **GraphSonnoFragment** with loaded data.
